---
title: A. Prerequisites
---

Before you can run the submission pipeline, your machine needs a small set of
tools: **Docker**, **Git**, the **GitHub CLI (`gh`)**, **make**, **OpenSSL**, and
**Python**. This page shows the pattern with **Docker**; the full per-tool
walkthrough is being written in
[issue #5](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/5).

::: {.callout-important}
You also need to have been **granted access** to the private BigPicture repos and
images first — see the [overview](index.qmd) and [GitHub access](github-access.qmd).
:::

## Install Docker

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Windows
Install **Docker Desktop** with the package manager:

```powershell
winget install --id Docker.DockerDesktop -e
```

Then launch Docker Desktop once so the engine starts.

## macOS
Install **Docker Desktop** with Homebrew:

```bash
brew install --cask docker
```

Then launch Docker Desktop once so the engine starts.

## Linux
Install **Docker Engine** from the official convenience script:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com | sh
```
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Verify

Paste this:

```bash
docker --version
```

Expected output (your version may differ):

```
Docker version 27.3.1, build ce12230
```
:::

## The rest of the toolbelt

You will also need the tools below. Detailed, verified per-OS steps for each are
tracked in [issue #5](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/5); they
all follow the same *install → verify* pattern shown above.

- **Git** — clone the pipeline repository.
- **GitHub CLI (`gh`)** — authenticate to the private repos and images ([step B](github-access.qmd)).
- **make** — run the pipeline's `make` targets.
- **OpenSSL** — generate TLS certificates ([step F](tls-credentials.qmd)).
- **Python** — required by some pipeline tooling.

Once every tool reports a version, continue to [B. GitHub access](github-access.qmd).
